<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- Wardrobe body -->
  <rect x="110" y="90" width="292" height="360" rx="18" fill="#E7F0FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="6"/>

  <!-- Inner panel -->
  <rect x="142" y="118" width="228" height="304" rx="12" fill="#F7FBFF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- Vertical door separator -->
  <line x1="256" y1="124" x2="256" y2="420" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="6"/>

  <!-- Hinges (top/bottom) -->
  <rect x="108" y="140" width="18" height="18" fill="#BFD0FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>
  <rect x="386" y="140" width="18" height="18" fill="#BFD0FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>
  <rect x="108" y="355" width="18" height="18" fill="#BFD0FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>
  <rect x="386" y="355" width="18" height="18" fill="#BFD0FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>

  <!-- Handles / knobs -->
  <circle cx="212" cy="255" r="10" fill="#FFD166" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="255" r="10" fill="#FFD166" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
  <rect x="206" y="248" width="12" height="14" rx="6" fill="#F9A825" opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="294" y="248" width="12" height="14" rx="6" fill="#F9A825" opacity="0.9"/>

  <!-- Top shelf line -->
  <line x1="155" y1="190" x2="357" y2="190" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- Drawers at bottom -->
  <rect x="155" y="300" width="202" height="120" rx="10" fill="#DDE7FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="350" x2="357" y2="350" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="400" x2="357" y2="400" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
  <circle cx="205" cy="375" r="8" fill="#FFD166" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>
  <circle cx="307" cy="375" r="8" fill="#FFD166" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="3"/>

  <!-- Small base shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="465" rx="150" ry="20" fill="#000000" opacity="0.08"/>
  <rect x="130" y="428" width="252" height="40" rx="12" fill="#DCE7FF" stroke="#2B3A67" stroke-width="4"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning: I'm thinking about a request for an SVG of a wardrobe. It shouldn’t have any text, just a clean illustration. I want to make it simple, using a rectangle for the body, adding doors and handle knobs, and maybe a few drawers for detail. I’ll include strokes and fills to give it some depth. The final dimension should be 512x512 pixels, and I’ll make sure to output it only in JSON format.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
